summary: Iteration 30: Tier 2 package upgrades verification complete. All 5 major package upgrades working correctly: date-fns 2→4.1, framer-motion→motion 12.38, recharts 2→3.8, react-day-picker 8→9.14, react-router-dom 6→react-router 7.14. All 29/29 Vitest unit tests pass. All UI flows working with upgraded packages.

test_results.yarn_test: PASS — 29/29 Vitest unit tests pass (12 in constants.test.js, 17 in mappers.test.js). Exits 0 in 0.96s.

package_upgrades_verified.date-fns: v4.1.0 — Working. Dates formatted correctly (Apr 03, 2026, 4/11/2026, etc.) across Dashboard, Calendar, Schedule, Messages, Profile, Manager pages
package_upgrades_verified.motion: v12.38.0 — Working. Animations render correctly on Login, Dashboard, Landing, PerformanceAnalytics pages. Import path changed from 'framer-motion' to 'motion/react'
package_upgrades_verified.recharts: v3.8.1 — Working. BarChart and PieChart render correctly on PerformanceAnalytics page with tooltips and legends
package_upgrades_verified.react-day-picker: v9.14.0 — Working. Calendar component renders correctly with month navigation, day selection, and game events displayed
package_upgrades_verified.react-router: v7.14.0 — Working. Navigation between all pages works correctly. Import path changed from 'react-router-dom' to 'react-router'

test_results.demo_manager_login: PASS — Click 'Try Demo Account' → dialog opens → 'Log in as Manager' → navigates to /manager. All 8 tabs visible and clickable (Tournaments, Assignments, Roster, Referees, Availability, Leaderboard, Standings, Reports)
test_results.demo_referee_login: PASS — Click 'Try Demo Account' → dialog opens → 'Log in as Referee' → navigates to /dashboard. Welcome message and stats cards visible
test_results.landing_page: PASS — Loads with motion animations, hero text, navigation links, CTA buttons
test_results.login_page: PASS — Renders with motion animations, form inputs, demo button
test_results.register_page: PASS — Loads with form inputs (name, email, phone, role, password)
test_results.dashboard_page: PASS — Renders with motion animations, stats cards, upcoming games, recent payments
test_results.calendar_page: PASS — Renders with react-day-picker v9 calendar showing April 2026 with game events
test_results.performance_analytics_page: PASS — Renders with recharts v3 (BarChart for Monthly Earnings, BarChart for Games Per Month, PieChart for Rating Distribution)
test_results.messages_page: PASS — Renders with inbox, message list, date-fns formatted timestamps
test_results.settings_page: PASS — Renders with 7 notification toggles, app preferences, account security
test_results.schedule_page: PASS — Renders with game list, date-fns formatted dates (April 2nd, 2026)
test_results.profile_page: PASS — Renders with personal info, certifications, performance ratings with date-fns dates
test_results.games_page: PASS — Renders with game cards, upcoming/completed sections, date-fns formatted dates
test_results.manager_tabs: PASS — All 8 tabs clickable and render content correctly

success_rate.backend: N/A (100% Firebase Firestore - no traditional backend)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 5 package upgrades verified, 29/29 unit tests pass, all UI flows working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 30 all green. Tier 2 package upgrades verified: date-fns 4.1 (21 files), motion 12.38 (34 files), recharts 3.8 (PerformanceAnalytics), react-day-picker 9.14 (calendar.jsx), react-router 7.14 (22 files). All demo login flows working. All pages render correctly with upgraded packages. Console shows minor recharts width/height warnings on initial render but charts display correctly after container sizing.
rca_of_issues: N/A — No bugs found. All package upgrades working correctly.
